response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile aimed at first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency that provides expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team offers comprehensive support for both buyers and sellers, covering all aspects of real estate transactions and financing. We specialize in helping first-time home buyers and experienced home buyers navigate the real estate market with confidence. With a focus on building long-term relationships, we serve a variety of locations including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region. Our small team of real estate experts is dedicated to providing personalized and reliable service to our clients.
